response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the provided lyrics for the song 'Diva'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for song lyrics. Manual transcription used for the spoken greeting at 03:01 and visual text during the intro. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles for the placeholder were included based on prominent visual text. Song lyrics are audio-anchored with precise start times. Applied instantaneous transitions for continuous rapid speech phrases to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original:
ときのそら お披露目誕生日 2026
告知あり
高鳴る心臓に祈りを乗せて
subtitles.english: Place a prayer on the pounding heart

subtitles.original: 曖昧な夢を描く
幻想は想像のまま
subtitles.english: The illusion remains just as imagination

subtitles.original: 終われないんだ

Diva
作詞・作曲・編曲：Aira(Dream Monster)
subtitles.english:
Diva
Lyrics, Music, & Arrangement: Aira (Dream Monster)

subtitles.original: みんな今日見に来てくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Everyone, thank you for coming to see me today!

subtitles.original: 答えを延々と探し続けて
subtitles.english: Continuing to search for the answer endlessly

subtitles.original: 何者かになりたくて
潸々と降る夕立を
subtitles.english: The evening shower falling in torrents,

subtitles.original: ただ眺めた
優しく寄り添って
心が晴れるのなら
翼が生えたような気がして
subtitles.english: I feel like I've grown wings

subtitles.original: いつだって隣にいるから
subtitles.english: Because you're always by my side

subtitles.original: だって言葉紡いで唄うことが
わたしの運命だ
世界にありふれた虚しささえも
上書きして
路地裏に咲いた花のように
subtitles.english: Like a flower blooming in the back alley

subtitles.original: 願いを照らす
小さな光に憧れて
名前を持たない歌なんて
神様は認めてくれない
一つ一つ枯れない花のよう
subtitles.english: Like flowers that never fade, one by one

subtitles.original: 昨日の自分にさよならして
subtitles.english: Saying goodbye to my yesterday's self

subtitles.original: 溢れた涙
うまく笑えなくてもいいかな
subtitles.english: It's okay if I can't smile well, right?

subtitles.original: だって理想は遠ざかってくばかり
subtitles.english: Because ideals just keep getting further away

subtitles.original: もう散々だよ
どれだけ手を伸ばして叫んだって
subtitles.english: No matter how much I reach out and shout

subtitles.original: 届かないの
望めばいつか叶うはずって信じてる
subtitles.english: I believe that if I wish, it will come true someday

subtitles.original: どうか 歌よ響いて
あぁ心臓の鼓動が今日も五月蝿い
subtitles.english: Ah, the beating of my heart is noisy again today
